payload.query: There has been growing elite policy polarization in the United States. Has there been parallel polarization or depolarization in other industrial democracies, Postcommunist democracies, or Latin America? How do scholars operationalize political representation, test citizen-elite congruence on policy issues, and draw conclusions? Cite pertinent literature.
